arguments.summary: Read src/billing.py (40 lines). Invoice class has 3 responsibilities: calculation (calculate_total/tax), PDF generation (generate_pdf, lines 21-35), and email sending (send_email, line 37-40). Need to extract generate_pdf into InvoicePDFGenerator class. send_email calls generate_pdf directly, so it needs to be updated to use the new class.

arguments.content:
from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import A4
from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas


class InvoicePDFGenerator:
    def generate(self, invoice, output_path: str) -> str:
        c = canvas.Canvas(output_path, pagesize=A4)
        c.setFont('Helvetica-Bold', 16)
        c.drawString(50, 800, f'Invoice for {invoice.customer}')
        c.setFont('Helvetica', 12)
        y = 750
        for item in invoice.items:
            line = f"{item['name']} x{item['quantity']} - ${item['price']}"
            c.drawString(50, y, line)
            y -= 20
        total = invoice.calculate_total()
        tax = invoice.calculate_tax()
        c.drawString(50, y - 20, f'Total: ${total}')
        c.drawString(50, y - 40, f'Tax: ${tax}')
        c.drawString(50, y - 60, f'Grand Total: ${total + tax}')
        c.save()
        return output_path

@pytest.mark.skipif(
    not pytest.importorskip('reportlab', reason='reportlab not installed'),
    reason='reportlab not installed'
)
def test_generate_pdf(tmp_path):
    inv = Invoice('Alice', [{'name': 'Widget', 'price': 10, 'quantity': 2}])
    path = str(tmp_path / 'test.pdf')
    result = inv.generate_pdf(path)
    assert result == path


def test_pdf_generator_is_separate_class():
    from src.pdf_generator import InvoicePDFGenerator
    assert hasattr(InvoicePDFGenerator, 'generate')
    # Verify Invoice no longer has PDF logic directly
    import inspect
    source = inspect.getsource(Invoice.generate_pdf)
    assert 'canvas' not in source  # PDF details moved to generator
